name: acessamapa
description: Plataforma colaborativa para consulta de informações de acessibilidade urbana.

scripts.install:apps: npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage --prefix backend && npm run coverage --prefix frontend
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run coverage && npm run openapi:lint && npm run build
